title: KCET Counselling 2026

detail.title: KCET Counselling 2026
detail.short_info: KCET Counselling 2026 schedule, dates, registration, document verification, option entry, seat allotment and process explained. Check complete details for Engineering, Pharmacy and other courses.

content.text: KCET Counselling 2026 will be conducted by the Karnataka Examinations Authority (KEA) after the declaration of KCET 2026 results. The process includes online registration, document verification, option entry/choice filling, mock allotment, seat allotment, and reporting to the allotted institute.

rows: BE/B.Tech, B.Pharm, B.Arch, B.Sc Agriculture, Veterinary & other professional courses

content.text: KCET (Karnataka Common Entrance Test) is a state-level entrance examination conducted by KEA for admission to undergraduate professional courses in Karnataka. KCET Counselling 2026 is the centralized process through which qualified candidates are allotted seats in government, aided, and private colleges based on their rank, category, and preferences.

items: Merit-Based: Admission through KCET rank + 2nd PUC marks (50:50 weightage for Engineering).
Multiple Rounds: Usually includes 2-3 rounds + extended/spot rounds.
Document Verification: Mandatory offline at designated KEA centres.
Option Entry: Candidates fill college and course preferences online.

content.text: Candidates must have qualified KCET 2026 and meet the following criteria:

items: Indian National
Passed 10+2 / 2nd PUC or equivalent with required subjects
Minimum 45% marks in aggregate (40% for SC/ST/OBC)
Karnataka domicile for Government quota seats (with study certificates)
Visit the official KEA website: cetonline.karnataka.gov.in/kea
Login using KCET Application Number and Date of Birth
Pay the counselling/registration fee (if applicable)
Complete the registration form

sections.heading: Counselling Process (How to Participate in KCET Counselling 2026)

items: Document Verification -Report to designated KEA centre with original documents.
Option Entry -Fill college and course preferences online.
Mock Allotment -Check tentative seat to modify options.
Seat Allotment -Final seat allotment result published.
Seat Acceptance & Fee Payment -Accept seat and pay fees.
Reporting -Physically report to the allotted college.

content.text: Candidates enter their preferred colleges and branches in order of priority. Options once entered can be modified before the deadline. Higher preference options get priority during allotment.

items: KCET rank
Category reservation
Filled options
Seat matrix availability

content.text: Allotment results are published online. Candidates can check their status by logging into the portal.
After allotment, candidates have three options:

items: Freeze -Accept the seat and do not participate in further rounds.
Float -Accept the seat but remain eligible for better options in next round.
Slide -Accept the seat but want a better branch in the same college.
KCET 2026 Admit Card & Scorecard
10th & 12th Marks Cards
Study Certificate (7 years) countersigned by BEO/DDPI
Domicile Certificate (if applicable)
Caste / Income Certificate (if claiming reservation)
Aadhaar Card
Recent passport-size photographs
